title: MALESHEVSKI MOUNTAINS Rural Tourism value chain in Maleshevski Region economic driving force
description: A policy brief analyzing the rural tourism value chain in the Maleshevski Mountains region of North Macedonia, exploring its role as an economic driving force and identifying challenges such as climate change impacts, depopulation, and competitiveness pressures. It proposes targeted policy recommendations including destination branding, legal improvements for property rights, integrated governance, and investments in green and digital solutions to sustain and enhance rural tourism development.
